subject: Galarian Corsola, a pale white bleached-coral Pokemon resting on a rocky surface near shallow water
description: A small, rounded Pokemon with a pale white body and dark spots sits still on a flat rock beside calm, shallow water. Its form resembles a chunk of bleached coral, smooth and rounded with small protrusions on top. The overall color is near-white with grey-blue shadow tones. The background is a muted lavender-grey, giving the scene a quiet, ghostly stillness. No dynamic pose — it simply sits, inert and hollow-looking.
foreground: pale white coral-form Pokemon on flat stone
background: calm shallow water, muted lavender-grey tones
